Scope Boundary

允许声明只限：V16 provider-backed photo-to-2D multi-action generation passed for the tested named provider and local cat-photo scenario。仍不得声明任意猫自动生成 ready、provider integration verified、Petdex parity、3D ready、photo-to-3D、marketplace 或 production release。
